name: Bom Cornwall
alt_names: ボム・コーンウォール
description:
__Race:__ Spirit

Bom Cornwall is the owner of the Gnome's General Store. Bom used to buy Lili's stolen goods even though he knew that she changed her appearance using Cinder Ella and didn't report her. He later showed his kindness again when he agreed to hide Lili from the Soma Familia.  

(Source: Danmachi Wiki)
